extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports proceedings against the Company, subsidiaries, directors and promoter, with criminal counts of Nil in every against row, two statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company, and taxation proceedings of 7 against the Company plus 1 against subsidiaries; there are no “By” rows, and promoter/director matters are excluded from the aggregate amount. For the Company and subsidiaries, the quantified against amounts are civil matters of ₹16.04 million and ₹279.33 million and taxation matters of ₹49.59 million and ₹1.64 million, respectively, totaling ₹346.60 million, or ₹34.66 crore; statutory/regulatory amounts are unquantified. The contingent-liabilities figure uses the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹61.68 million as of March 31, 2017, converted to ₹6.168 crore, rather than summing line items. Customer concentration is company-wide for Fiscal Year 2017 and measured against total revenue from operations: top five customers contributed 43.07% and top ten contributed 66.96%. The source tables use ₹ millions; conversion is 1 crore = ₹10 million, so million amounts were divided by 10.
